name: Ed Barlow
tagline: Software engineer, database architect, and published author. Building thoughtful systems for complex problems.
home_html:
AI Enabled Senior Principal Engineer / Technology Leader looking for AI Enablement Roles

My Process Based Methodology and scale-proven Technology Rules combine into a Specification Driven Framework

This lets your programes seamlessly work together and gives you a unified command center.

Tell claude to conform your existing projects and - it does it - minimal impact on your existing code.

Tell your AI agent to write a specification for the program you want to build not the program you want to build in a markdown. Be clear it should provide no 'technical' details but should design a complete set of features and screens. Put it in a directory and use our bash workflow to transform into a supportable application. With complete control along the way so your application is what you want.

  • Control Panel - One View on all your projects (namespaced) with embedded Controls
  • Service Catalog - provides Seamless Interoperability (Rest, CLI, Async interfaces)
  • Opinionated Stack - Consistent Builds, Context Optimized
  • Formal Workflow - Process Updating Applications, Light-weight kanban
  • Seamless Operations - Monitoring, Documentation, Scheduled tasks, and Data Flows
  • Self Iteration Workflow - Magically update your code with new features (you just ask it to)
  • Scorecards, Validators, and a Code Build Process ensure quality
  • Voice Control of your program fleet (in progress)

Principal Engineer/Director at hedge funds, investment banks, insurance companies, and startups

Author, Speaker, Free Software Developer
